translations.vi: Em gái tôi là nhạc sĩ.
translations.id: Adik perempuan saya adalah seorang musisi.

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; feminine nominative singular agreeing with the head noun; marks possession.
Common noun; feminine nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite auxiliary used as a copula; 3rd person singular present; links subject to predicate nominal.
Predicate noun (predicative complement) after a copula; feminine singular; denotes profession/identity; no article.

sentences.target: Die Musikerin probt heute im Keller.

translations.de: Die Musikerin probt heute im Keller.
translations.en: The musician is practicing in the basement today.
translations.es: La música ensaya hoy en el sótano.
translations.fr: La musicienne répète au sous-sol aujourd’hui.
translations.it: La musicista prova oggi in cantina.
translations.zh-Hans: 这位音乐家今天在地下室练习。
translations.yue: 嗰位樂手今日喺地庫練習。
translations.pt: A musicista está ensaiando no porão hoje.
translations.vi: Hôm nay nhạc sĩ tập luyện dưới tầng hầm.
translations.nl: De muzikante oefent vandaag in de kelder.
translations.hu: A zenésznő ma a pincében próbál.
translations.hi: संगीतकार आज तहखाने में अभ्यास कर रही है.
translations.el: Η μουσικός κάνει πρόβα σήμερα στο υπόγειο.
translations.nb: Musikeren øver i kjelleren i dag.
translations.id: Musisi itu berlatih di ruang bawah tanah hari ini.
translations.sv: Musikern övar i källaren i dag.
translations.da: Musikeren øver i kælderen i dag.
translations.ja: その音楽家は今日、地下室で練習しています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; feminine nominative singular; marks the subject.
Common noun; feminine nominative singular; subject of the verb.
Finite main verb; 3rd person singular present; intransitive ‘to rehearse/practice’.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb; indicates time.
Contraction of preposition ‘in’ + definite article ‘dem’; governs dative; introduces a locative PP.
Common noun; masculine dative singular as object of the preposition ‘im’; denotes location.

sentences.target: Ich frage die Musikerin nach einem Autogramm.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈfʁaːɡə diː ˈmuːzikəʁɪn naːx ˈaɪ̯nəm aʊtoˈɡʁam/

translations.de: Ich frage die Musikerin nach einem Autogramm.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈfʁaːɡə diː ˈmuːzikəʁɪn naːx ˈaɪ̯nəm aʊtoˈɡʁam/
translations.en: I ask the musician for an autograph.
translations.es: Le pido un autógrafo a la música.
translations.fr: Je demande un autographe à la musicienne.
translations.zh-Hans: 我向这位音乐家要签名。
translations.pt: Eu peço um autógrafo à musicista.
translations.vi: Tôi xin nhạc sĩ một chữ ký.
translations.nl: Ik vraag de muzikante om een handtekening.
translations.hi: मैं संगीतकार से ऑटोग्राफ माँगता हूँ.
translations.el: Ζητάω από τη μουσικό ένα αυτόγραφο.
translations.nb: Jeg spør musikeren om en autograf.
translations.id: Saya meminta tanda tangan dari musisi itu.
translations.sv: Jag ber musikern om en autograf.
translations.da: Jeg beder musikeren om en autograf.
translations.ja: 私はその音楽家にサインをお願いします。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Finite main verb; 1st person singular present.
Definite article; feminine accusative singular; marks the direct object.
Common noun; feminine accusative singular; direct object of ‘frage’.
Preposition governing dative; here meaning ‘for’ (request). Introduces a PP complement of the verb.
Indefinite article; dative neuter singular; agrees with ‘Autogramm’.
Common noun; neuter dative singular; object of the preposition ‘nach’.

sentences.target: Unsere Nachbarin arbeitet als Musikerin im Theater.
sentences.reading: /ˈʊnzʁə ˈnaχbaːʁɪn ˈaʁbaɪ̯tət als ˈmuːzikəʁɪn ɪm teˈaːtɐ/

translations.de: Unsere Nachbarin arbeitet als Musikerin im Theater.
translations.ipa: /ˈʊnzʁə ˈnaχbaːʁɪn ˈaʁbaɪ̯tət als ˈmuːzikəʁɪn ɪm teˈaːtɐ/
translations.en: Our neighbor works as a musician at the theater.
translations.es: Nuestra vecina trabaja como música en el teatro.
translations.fr: Notre voisine travaille comme musicienne au théâtre.
translations.it: La nostra vicina lavora come musicista al teatro.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们的邻居在剧院当音乐家。
translations.yue: 我哋嘅鄰居喺劇院做樂手。
translations.ru: Наша соседка работает музыканткой в театре.
translations.pt: Nossa vizinha trabalha como musicista no teatro.
translations.vi: Hàng xóm của chúng tôi làm nhạc sĩ ở nhà hát.
translations.nl: Onze buurvrouw werkt als muzikante in het theater.
translations.uk: Наша сусідка працює музиканткою в театрі.
translations.hu: A szomszédunk a színházban zenészként dolgozik.
translations.hi: हमारी पड़ोसन थिएटर में संगीतकार के रूप में काम करती है.
translations.pl: Nasza sąsiadka pracuje jako muzyczka w teatrze.
translations.el: Η γειτόνισά μας δουλεύει ως μουσικός στο θέατρο.
translations.nb: Naboen vår jobber som musiker på teatret.
translations.id: Tetangga kami bekerja sebagai musisi di teater.
translations.sv: Vår granne jobbar som musiker på teatern.
translations.ro: Vecina noastră lucrează ca muziciană la teatru.
translations.cs: Naše sousedka pracuje jako hudebnice v divadle.
translations.da: Vores nabo arbejder som musiker på teatret.
translations.ja: うちの隣人は劇場で音楽家として働いています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; feminine nominative singular; modifies the subject.
Common noun; feminine nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb; 3rd person singular present; intransitive.
Marker ‘as’ introducing a predicative role/complement with certain verbs (here ‘arbeiten als ...’).
Noun functioning as a role/predicative complement within the ‘als’-phrase; no article.
Contraction of preposition ‘in’ + definite article ‘dem’; governs dative; introduces a locative PP.
Common noun; neuter dative singular as object of the preposition ‘im’; location.
